headline: McDonald’s Puts Red Bull On The Menu
summary: Red Bull is an enormous energy drink company. It sold 14 billion cans last year, generating $14 billion in revenue. Its primary benefit to buyers is its high level of caffeine. Red Bull only has two major competitors. One in Monster (NASDAQ: MNST), which has a market cap of $73 billion. The other is Celsius ... McDonald’s Puts Red Bull On The Menu

headline: McDonald's Bets On Energy Drinks To Lift Value And Repeat Visits
summary: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) is planning a U.S. rollout of energy drinks and crafted sodas aimed at younger, price sensitive customers. The lineup is set to include branded options such as Red Bull Dragonberry Energizer alongside custom soda combinations. This beverage push comes as the company phases out self serve soda and ties drink offerings more tightly to its value messaging. For investors watching NYSE:MCD at a share price of $304.51, this move sits alongside a mixed return profile, with...

headline: McDonald’s makes a surprising menu shift in the U.S.
